creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 222448
Upgrade math/py-sympy to 1.7.1

- The attached patch upgrades SymPy to 1.7.1;
Release notes at <https://github.com/sympy/sympy/wiki/release-notes-for-1.7.1>

- Since I'm there, add a test target.

Note: several failures are encountered during these tests, and I reported them at <https://github.com/sympy/sympy/issues/20960>.
